use_cases: Display user notification centers with activity feed
Show recent actions and updates in application headers
Present task assignments and reminders in project management tools
Function as notification bell dropdown in navigation bars
Serve as a unified activity feed for social or collaboration platforms
ai_summary: A polished activity and notification dropdown component featuring five predefined activity types with icons and timestamps. The component includes smooth morphing animations (border radius transition) and dark mode support, making it suitable for notification centers or header navigation in web applications.
